info.title: Headless CMS – Frontend API
info.description: Content API for the React SPA: pages, blog, legal, static, docs, live sessions, modules, features, solutions, vacancies, settings, sitemap. No authentication required.

post.description: Record guest activity for web stats. Best-effort: returns 200 with status "tracked", "skipped", or "error". No auth. Throttled. Call from frontend (e.g. React) on page load or periodically.
Best-effort endpoint that records a page view. Returns 200 even when the server-side tracking fails.
Batch endpoint for SPA applications. Accepts up to 10 views per request. Best-effort; returns 200 with status "tracked" or "error".
Best-effort endpoint that records basic performance metrics. Returns 200 even when the server-side tracking fails.

get.description: Returns cached public analytics stats. On failure returns HTTP 500 with {"status":"error"}.
Returns the active pages root-to-leaf tree (optimized for the SPA).
Returns visible blocks for a given page slug.
Sitemap in XML format (application/xml).
Returns an empty media list for now (for future media integration).

post.description: Subscribe an email to the newsletter.

422.description: Validation error (e.g. invalid or duplicate email)

get.description: Returns a public category tree for articles.
Returns a single category and its active articles (paginated).
Returns a list of tags with article counts.
Returns a tag and its active articles (paginated) and related pages.
Returns media files (paginated). Optional filters: folder, mime_type, search.
Returns a single media record by id.
Returns an active form by slug, including fields configuration.

post.description: Submit a public form by slug. Validation rules depend on the configured form fields.

schema.description: The payload includes a "fields" object. Keys inside "fields" are dynamic based on form configuration.

get.description: Paginated list of all active blog posts. Query: page, per_page, search, category.

200.description: Blog list with data, has_more, next_page

get.description: Search in title, meta_keywords, short_body, long_body. Throttled. Query: q, per_page.

get.summary: Get a blog post by slug

post.description: Create a comment on the blog post identified by {slug}. Send as form fields (application/x-www-form-urlencoded or multipart/form-data). Blog is specified in the URL.

parent_id.description: ID of parent comment for replies

guest_name.description: Your name (required when not logged in)

guest_email.description: Your email (required when not logged in)

post.summary: Like a comment on a blog post
post.description: Record a like for the given comment. The comment must belong to the blog post identified by {slug}.

404.description: Blog post or comment not found

post.summary: Dislike a comment on a blog post
post.description: Record a dislike for the given comment. The comment must belong to the blog post identified by {slug}.

404.description: Blog post or comment not found

get.description: Paginated changelog entries. Optional query: per_page, status=api|all.
Search in title, description, content. Throttled. Query: q, per_page.
Contact page content and subject options (Onderwerp dropdown) for headless frontend.

200.description: Contact page data with optional subjects

get.description: List of active subject options (Onderwerp) for the contact form dropdown. Managed in admin under CRM → Subjects.

post.description: Submit as form fields (application/x-www-form-urlencoded or multipart/form-data for file attachment). Accepts Dutch names: voornaam/achternaam, onderwerp, organisatie.

bijlage.description: One or more file attachments (required when reden=ondersteuning; use multipart/form-data with bijlage[] for multiple). Max 10MB each; pdf, jpg, png, doc, docx, xls, xlsx, ppt, pptx, txt.

get.description: Featured session, upcoming, recent videos, presenters, categories. Optional q= for search.
Search videos and live sessions. Throttled. Query: q, per_page.
Active doc sections with pages tree.
Single doc page by section and page slugs.
Search in title and content. Throttled. Query: q (min 2 chars), per_page.
Active features with solution and modules. Hierarchy: solution → feature → module.
Search in title, description. Throttled. Query: q, per_page.

200.description: Single feature with solution and modules

get.description: Editable homepage sections (hero, feature cards, about OPMS, how it works, user features, competition, latest updates title, bottom CTA). Managed in admin under Edit Homepage. Header and footer come from GET /api/settings. Section content uses variable-length arrays (e.g. hero.bullets, feature_cards.cards, how_it_works.steps, competition.boxes, user_features.left_items/right_items). feature_cards may include an optional section title.

200.description: Object keyed by section_key (hero, feature_cards, about_opms, how_it_works, user_features, competition, latest_updates, bottom_cta). Each value is a section content object; arrays (bullets, cards, steps, boxes, left_items, right_items) are variable length. Image fields are resolved to full URLs.

get.description: Grouped site, theme, SEO, contact/map, cookie, hero, header and footer settings for frontend.

get.summary: Get a legal page by slug
get.description: Returns a single active legal document (e.g. privacy, terms) by slug.
Upcoming and past live sessions.
Search in title, description, content. Throttled. Query: q, per_page.
Paginated past sessions.
Mega menu tree with slug and page_type per item (headless: frontend builds routes). Header settings included.
Footer links grouped by column.
Header and footer menus in one response.
Sticky menu items for mobile or secondary nav.
Active modules with parent feature. Hierarchy: solution → feature → module.
Returns a paginated list of active pages (for React SPA).
Search in title, short_body, long_body. Throttled. Query: q, per_page.
Returns a single active page by slug.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Page slug or nested path (e.g. about-us or services/web-development)

get.description: Returns the single partners record (type=0). data is an array of link items. When not configured, returns 200 with empty data so the frontend can hide the section.

200.description: Partners record or empty when not configured

get.description: Plans, boosters, and features.
Boosters for configurator.

Returns the robots.txt file content as plain text. For use by the React SPA (e.g. to serve at /robots.txt or display in admin). Content is managed in the admin Robots.txt editor and cached for 24 hours.
Full-text search across pages, blog, solutions, docs, course, and changelog. Use type to filter or "all" for combined results.
Autocomplete suggestions (solutions, blog). Min 2 characters in q.
Sitemap as JSON: array of { loc, priority }. API paths only (from config); frontend builds full URL from its own origin.

200.description: API paths with loc and priority

get.description: Active solutions with nested features (each feature includes modules). Hierarchy: solution → feature → module.
Search in title, short_body, long_body. Throttled. Query: q, per_page.

200.description: Single solution with features and modules

get.summary: Get a static page by slug
get.description: Returns a single active static content page by slug.
Returns the single tech stack record (type=1). data is an array of link items, each with link, link_type, image, sort_order, url (resolved), image_url.
Solutions for trial form.
Paginated with filters: search, type, location, department, category, per_page.
Search in title, description, department. Throttled. Query: q, per_page.
Vacancy details for application form.

post.description: Body: name, email, phone?, cover_letter?, resume?, linkedin_url?, portfolio_url?, repo_url?

BlogListItem.title: Blog list item
BlogListItem.description: Blog post summary for list views

BlogType.title: Blog type
BlogType.description: Optional type for the post (e.g. Article, News)

description.description: Optional description of the blog type

Blog.title: Blog post
Blog.description: Single blog post with full content

ContactSubjectListItem.title: Contact subject option
ContactSubjectListItem.description: Single subject option for contact form Onderwerp dropdown

CourseVideo.title: Course video
CourseVideo.description: Single course video with category and chapter

CourseCategory.title: Course category
CourseCategory.description: Single category with chapters and videos

FeatureSolutionRef.title: Feature solution reference
FeatureSolutionRef.description: Parent solution summary when feature is loaded with solution

FeatureListItem.title: Feature list item
FeatureListItem.description: Feature summary for list and nested responses (e.g. under a solution). Contains nested modules.

Feature.title: Feature
Feature.description: Single feature; belongs to a solution and has many modules (solution → feature → module).

MenuItem.title: Menu item
MenuItem.description: Header menu tree node (id, title, subtitle, description, url, slug, page_type, template, order, tags, children)

slug.description: Page slug when page_type is page

template.description: Frontend template hint for routing: e.g. contact, blog-list, blog-detail, page

tags.description: Optional tags for styling or grouping (e.g. nav, cta, primary)

template.description: Frontend template hint: e.g. contact, blog-list, blog-detail, page
Frontend template hint: e.g. contact, blog-list, blog-detail, page

ModuleFeatureRef.title: Module feature reference
ModuleFeatureRef.description: Parent feature summary when module is loaded with feature

ModuleListItem.title: Module list item
ModuleListItem.description: Module summary for list and nested responses (e.g. under a feature)

Module.title: Module
Module.description: Single module with full content; belongs to a feature (solution → feature → module).

PageListItem.title: Page list item
PageListItem.description: Page summary (no long_body) for list views

layout.description: Page layout key (e.g. default, landing, minimal)

PartnerTechItem.title: Partners / Tech stack record
PartnerTechItem.description: Single record per type (partner or tech_stack). data is an array of link items, each with link, link_type, image, sort_order, url (resolved), image_url.

type.description: page, blog, solution, doc, course_video, course_category, changelog

ThemeSettings.title: Theme settings
ThemeSettings.description: Theme colors and typography from admin Theme Settings. Used for header, footer, and brand styling on the frontend.

SettingsResponse.title: Site settings response
SettingsResponse.description: Grouped site, theme, SEO, contact/map, cookie, hero, header and footer settings for frontend.

site.description: Site name, tagline, logo, favicon, contact, copyright

seo.description: Meta title, description, keywords, Google Analytics ID

hero.description: Hero background image URLs by section

header.description: Header CTA button text and URL

SolutionListItem.title: Solution list item
SolutionListItem.description: Solution summary for list responses. Contains nested features (each with modules).

features.description: Features belonging to this solution (each with modules)

Solution.title: Solution
Solution.description: Single solution with full content. Solutions have many features; each feature has many modules (solution → feature → module).

faq.description: Optional FAQ items for this solution

features.description: Features belonging to this solution (each with modules)

tags.name: Academy
tags.description: Course content (categories, videos) and live sessions. All endpoints under /api/course.
